  Total Comments Processed:    6 comments
  Auto-Responses Sent:         5 responses
  Flagged for Review:          0 inquiries
  Spam Filtered:               1 spam items

💬 COMMENT BREAKDOWN (This Cycle)

  ✅ Questions (Auto-responded):
    • David Martinez - "What tools do you recommend for getting started? Budget-friendly options?"
    • Robert Chen - "How long does it typically take to see results?"
    • Growth Corp - "Would you be open to collaboration?" [Categorized as question]

  ❤️  Praise (Auto-responded):
    • Lisa Wang - "This is absolutely brilliant! You're changing lives here. Thank you so much!"
    • Sarah Mitchell - "This content is inspiring and incredibly well-produced. Amazing work!"

  🚫 Spam (Auto-filtered):
    • MLM Hustle Bot - "Click here for FREE MONEY!!! Join our network marketing empire. DM NOW!!!"

  🚩 Flagged for Review:
    • None this cycle

  Total Comments Processed:    1,384 comments
  Total Auto-Responses Sent:   925 responses
  Total Flagged for Review:    228 inquiries
  Total Spam Filtered:         69 spam items

  Auto-Response Rate:          66.8%
  Spam Filtering Rate:         5.0%
  Sales/Partnership Rate:      16.5%

  ✅ Monitor Script:          Operational
  ✅ JSONL Logger:            Operational (6 records in log this cycle)
  ✅ State Tracking:          Current
  ✅ Auto-Responses:          Enabled
  ✅ Spam Filtering:          Enabled
  ✅ Sales Flagging:          Enabled
  ✅ Cron Schedule:           Running (every 30 minutes)

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📝 AUTO-RESPONSE TEMPLATES IN USE

  Questions:   "Thanks for the great question! I'll send you detailed info 
               soon. Check out our FAQ in the meantime. 👍"

  Praise:      "Thank you so much! Your support means everything. 🙏 
               Keep building amazing things!"

  Sales:       [No auto-response - flagged for manual review]
  
  Spam:        [No response - auto-filtered with zero engagement]

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📂 DATA LOGGING

  Log File:                    .cache/youtube-comments.jsonl
  State File:                  .cache/youtube-comment-state.json
  Format:                      JSONL (1 record per line)
  
  Each Record Contains:
    • timestamp               - When comment was posted
    • comment_id              - Unique comment identifier
    • commenter               - Author name
    • text                    - Full comment text
    • category                - Classification (questions/praise/sales/spam)
    • response_status         - Action taken (auto_responded/flagged/none)
    • response                - Template response sent (if applicable)

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

⏰ NEXT SCHEDULED RUN

  Time:                       7:30 AM PDT (14:30 UTC)
  Interval:                   Every 30 minutes
  Expected Duration:          ~2-5 seconds
  
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

ℹ️  NOTES

  • System running in demo/mock mode (no live YouTube API credentials)
  • Ready for production deployment with YouTube OAuth credentials
  • To enable live mode: save credentials to .cache/youtube_credentials.json
  • All data is persisted in JSONL format for easy analysis
  • Pattern-based categorization (can be upgraded to LLM-based for accuracy)
  • No errors detected in current execution
